events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge of trench. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires spoil piles to be kept at least 2 ft from the edge of the trench. "within 2 ft" means less than 2 ft, so non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical? Spoil pile too close can cause cave-in, fall hazard. I'd say high or critical. Let's say high. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 80? Value: distance ~2 ft or less. Let's set value to 2 (ft) as estimated reading. Confidence 0.85. Findings: spoil pile within 2 ft of trench edge. Actions: move spoil pile at least 2 ft back from edge. Rationale: OSHA requires spoil at least 2 ft from edge. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P 1926.651(j)(2).
